response.global_analysis: 1. Reference JSON Mismatch: The reference JSON incorrectly identified the second performer as Kobo Kanaeru performing 'Chururira-Chururira-Daddadda!'. Our manual audio-visual verification correctly identified the performer as Nerissa Ravencroft singing 'Nounai Percentage' (脳内パーセンテージ) originally by P-Maru-sama. 2. Reference JSON Usage: Used the first song's lyrics for Tokoyami Towa's performance ('Palette'). For the second half, discarded the incorrect reference and did 100% manual transcription and translation. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all lyrics and spoken dialogue parts with high precision, maintaining instant transitions where appropriate.

subtitles.original: 強く

subtitles.english: I'll keep wishing every time I touch the light

subtitles.original: はーい！みなさま！
この靴は！私のお気に入り！
今すぐグチャグチャにして、チュチュチュってしたいよ！
